howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.description: The fastest and smartest way to get your visuals to marketplaces.
howItWorks.step1Desc: Drag and drop your product image or high-resolution stock photo onto the platform.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our advanced image processing model detects colors, composition, objects, and potential SEO values.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Platform-specific listings for e-commerce sites (Amazon, Etsy, etc.) and stock platforms are generated within seconds.
howItWorks.step4Desc: Complete your upload in seconds using exported CSV files or quick copy tools.

features.title: Professional Solutions
features.description: Advanced tools specifically designed for e-commerce sellers, brands, and stock contributors.
features.f1Desc: Creates high-search-volume titles and marketplace-compatible descriptions tailored to each uploaded photo.
features.f2Desc: Generates pools of 25+ tags that best represent the image content and boost visibility in search algorithms.
features.f3Desc: Queue hundreds of photos at once and generate all metadata sets in the background in a single batch.
features.f4Desc: Get output in CSV formats specific to online sales channels like Etsy, Amazon, Shopify, or Adobe Stock, Shutterstock, Freepik.
features.f5Desc: Safely store all your previous analyses and generations, search and copy them anytime you need.
features.f6Desc: Create tags for both e-commerce marketplaces (Etsy, Trendyol, Amazon, etc.) and popular stock sites with a single click.

benefits.title:
Create More,
Sell Faster.
benefits.description: MayaListing fully automates the most tedious and time-consuming process in your creative workflow, so you can focus on what matters.
benefits.b1Desc: Stop entering keywords one by one for each image. Save up to 90% of your time.
benefits.b2Desc: Multiply your images' visibility on marketplaces with SEO-optimized algorithms.
benefits.b3Desc: Eliminate inaccurate and irrelevant tags. Deliver data that matches search results precisely.
benefits.b4Desc: List your new e-commerce products and stock designs for sale in hours instead of days with bulk export.

pricing.title: Flexible & Transparent Plans
pricing.description: Subscription packages suitable for every scale, from individual creators to large agencies.
pricing.pricingFootnote: Yearly billing gives you 2 months free (about 17% off the monthly rate). Unused analysis credits roll over month to month as long as your subscription stays active.

testimonials.title: Trusted by Creators
testimonials.description: What creators managing world-class stock portfolios say about MayaListing.
testimonials.t1Quote: "Thanks to MayaListing, the tagging time for the 200+ stock photos I upload weekly dropped from 4 hours to 15 minutes. Plus, I've seen a noticeable increase in my sales."
testimonials.t2Quote: "We use MayaListing for tagging and SEO descriptions of our handmade wood products sold on Etsy and Amazon. The accuracy and quality of results is absolutely outstanding."
testimonials.t3Quote: "As a visual agency, we archive and catalog product images for hundreds of clients. MayaListing' CSV bulk export and history panel is exactly the professional solution we were looking for."

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Key topics and answers about MayaListing.
faq.q1: What is the accuracy of AI metadata generation?
faq.a1: MayaListing uses advanced computer vision and natural language processing algorithms. By analyzing objects, composition, and color tones in the image, it generates titles and tags compliant with stock site policies with over 95% accuracy.
faq.a2: We support all global stock photo platforms, primarily Adobe Stock, Shutterstock, Freepik, and Vecteezy. We also generate SEO-compatible titles and search tags for e-commerce platforms like Trendyol, Etsy, Amazon, and Shopify.
faq.q3: How is the privacy of my uploaded images protected?
faq.a3: Your privacy is very important to us. Uploaded images are only processed during the analysis and stored encrypted on our secure servers. None of your images are shared with third parties or used for general AI model training.
faq.q4: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
faq.a4: Yes, you can cancel your subscription or switch between plans anytime from the billing page in your dashboard, with no commitment. In case of cancellation, your access continues until the end of the current billing period.

legal.termsContent:
1. Parties and Definitions

These Terms of Service have been concluded between the MayaListing platform ("Platform") and all users ("User") who access or use the Platform. The Platform is a software service (SaaS) providing AI-powered stock photo metadata and e-commerce analysis services.

2. Scope and Use of Service

MayaListing allows users to analyze their images and generate titles, descriptions, keywords and tags for those images. The User may benefit from the service within the limits of their chosen membership plan (Starter, Pro, Studio). The service may be restricted in case of limit exceeded or non-payment.

3. Intellectual Property Rights

All software, designs, codes and AI algorithms on the Platform belong to MayaListing. The User may not copy, modify or reverse engineer the source code of the Platform. The copyright and ownership rights of images uploaded for analysis belong entirely to the User; MayaListing claims no rights over these images.

4. Limitation of Liability

Metadata (title, description, keywords) generated by artificial intelligence is advisory in nature. MayaListing does not guarantee the accuracy of the generated data, sales success on marketplaces, or approval on stock platforms. The User is fully responsible for the legal liability of images they share or upload.

5. Amendments and Termination

MayaListing reserves the right to update these Terms of Service without prior notice. Updated terms become effective from the moment they are published on the Platform. The User's continued use of the Platform constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.
legal.privacyContent:
1. Data Collected

When using our Platform, your name, email address and password are collected for membership operations; payment and billing information processed by Stripe/Lemon Squeezy payment gateways are collected for payment operations. Images you upload for analysis are processed temporarily on our servers only during the AI analysis process.

2. Processing and Security of Images

The photos you upload are processed solely for generating metadata specific to you. Your images are never shared with third parties, sold, or used as datasets for general training of our AI models. Your files are transferred to our servers using secure encryption methods (SSL/TLS).

3. Cookies

Cookies are used to maintain your login session, remember your theme preferences (Light/Dark mode) and analyze overall website performance. You can change cookie management from your browser settings as you wish.

4. Third-Party Services

MayaListing uses Supabase (database and user management), Stripe/Lemon Squeezy (payment integration) and Google Gemini (AI model) services for infrastructure. The privacy and security policies of these platforms apply.

5. Contact

For all questions and requests regarding our privacy policy, you can contact us at destek.mayalisting@gmail.com.
legal.kvkkContent:
This Disclosure Text has been prepared in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Law No. 6698 ("KVKK"), by MayaListing as data controller, to inform users about the purposes, legal grounds and rights regarding the processing of personal data obtained from users.

1. Your Personal Data Processed

Data processed by MayaListing includes: Identity information (Name, Surname), contact information (Email address), customer transaction information (membership plan, usage history), transaction security information (IP address, login logs) and payment status information.

2. Purposes of Processing Data

Your personal data is processed for the purposes of providing services on the Platform, creating and verifying user accounts, managing billing and payment processes, responding to support requests and fulfilling legal obligations.

3. Transfer of Personal Data

Your personal data may be transferred to our business partners (Supabase, Stripe, Lemon Squeezy) solely for the purpose of uninterrupted provision of the services specified above and within the limits stipulated by law. Legal notifications may be made to relevant institutions in accordance with legal requests of authorized official authorities.

4. Rights of the Personal Data Subject (KVKK Article 11)

Within the scope of Article 11 of KVKK, as data subjects, you have the following rights:

  • Learning whether your personal data is processed,
  • Requesting information if it has been processed,
  • Learning the purpose of processing personal data and whether they are used in accordance with the purpose,
  • Knowing the third parties to whom personal data is transferred domestically or abroad,
  • Requesting correction in case personal data is incomplete or incorrectly processed,
  • Requesting deletion or destruction of personal data within the framework of KVKK conditions.

To exercise these rights, you can send your requests with a wet-signature petition or from your registered email address to destek.mayalisting@gmail.com.

blog.title: Guides and Tips
